fields.self_product_doc: We help indie builders monitor fast-moving AI product changes.

fields.change_summary: Lovable added a new homepage block focused on AI workflow shipping speed.
fields.strategic_intent: The competitor is sharpening its differentiation around faster delivery for solo teams.
fields.action_suggestion: Review our homepage hero to make our shipping speed value more explicit.
fields.evidence_diff: New section: 'Ship AI workflows in minutes'.

fields.change_summary: v0 refreshed its pricing page and now highlights a higher annual plan.
fields.strategic_intent: The competitor appears to be nudging users toward higher-commitment subscriptions.
fields.action_suggestion: Benchmark our pricing page language against the new annual plan framing.
fields.evidence_diff: Pricing page now shows a highlighted annual card.
fields.user_comment: Too generic, need stronger product-specific takeaways.
